title: Senior Software Engineer - Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Join the Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd family as a Senior Software Engineer in Gwalior. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd!
